overview.description: The iShares National Muni Bond ETF (MUB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE AMT-Free US National Municipal index. The fund tracks a market-weighted index of investment-grade debt issued by state and local governments and agencies. Interest is exempt from US income tax and from AMT. MUB was launched on Sep 7, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.
